message:
feat(ffs-btree): implement ext4 extent B+tree operations (bd-zge.1)

Search, insert, delete, and walk over the ext4 extent tree stored in
inode i_block[15] fields and external blocks. Supports node splitting,
tree growth (depth 0 -> 1 -> 2+), range deletion with extent trimming,
and hole punch. 14 tests covering all operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
